feedback: I appreciate how transparently the plans are designed with no hidden conditions. The Rs 299 plan clearly states 2GB daily data unlimited calls and 30 day validity. What you see on the website is exactly what you get after reacharg.
Best pln features at Rs 239 here.
plns overpriced and no value at all.

There is no affordable plan that suits moderate users anymore. Either pay Rs 799 for features I do not need or settle for basic plan with insufficient data. The middle ground has been deliberately eliminated from their portfolio. The features included justify every rupee of the cost.
Good plan and Disney+ Hotstar bundle included.

The Rs 999 pln with 2.5GB daily and 365 day validity is standard industry offering. Comparable to what every other operator provides at this tier. No competitive advantage or disadvantage over alternatives available. The plan structure works well for my usage patterns.

Standard Rs 249 plan with average features. The SonyLIV bundle included keeps deactivating which diminishes the otherwise acceptable plan package. This combination of features and cost is hard to beat.
Rs 299 plan gives too little data.

I cannot find a plan that matches my usage pattern on this operator. Heavy data users are overserved at high prices while moderate users like me who need maybe 3GB daily at a reasonable price have no good options. The plan structure works well for my usage patterns.

Plan at Rs 249 is standard but network coverage in Surat is excellent everywhere. Average plan on an above average network is an acceptable combination. Good plan design shows the operator understands users.

The plan structure has become deliberately confusing with multiple options at similar prices with marginal differences designed to trick users into choosing expensive plans. Simplicity in plan design is clearly not a priority. I can recommend this plan based on personal experience.

The plns have become progressively worse every quarter while prices steadily increase. What I could get for Rs 599 a year ago now costs significantly more with fewer features. Consistent value degradation. I appreciate the transparency in plan design.

The Rs 199 pln is perfectly designed for working professionals who need reliable connectivity throughout the month. With 5GB daily data and 28 day validity I never worry about running out or recharging too frequently. I appreciate the transparency in plan design.

I am disappointed that my plan was suddenly discontinued without notice. The replacement costs Rs 799 more for nearly identical features. Forcing existing customers to migrate to expensive plans without adequate notice is anti-consumer practice. The flexibility in plan options accommodates all budgets.
Plan expensive but speed fast and coverage good.
